title: Kaleidoscope Compat
body:
# Overview

This mod unifies some items in **Kaleidoscope: Cookery** that overlap with those from other mods and adds compatibility with several mods.

You can suggest more mods to the author for potential integration.

A boon for lazy players (lol).

Some mods' grass drops from grass breaking with a straw hat now also include seeds, such as those from **Vinery**.

## Compatibility List
- Farmer's Delight
- [Let's Do] Farm & Charm
- Bakeries
- Overweight Farming
- Drop the Meat
- Sakura
- Youkai's Homecoming
- Crock Pot
- Let's do Wine / Vinery

![TOMATO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbf17e1a5d99b0b2e12f7569f788ca337b4d541d.png)
